title: NTS Radio
name: NTS Radio
body:
Online radio platform. NTS has a confirmed Killd By artist page at **https://www.nts.live/artists/113356-killd-by** listing shows and mixes.

## Known Killd By appearances on NTS

**Machines of Loving Grace w/ Midwife** — first broadcast January 6, 2022. Tracks played include *L\*a\*p\*s\*e\**, *Tha Good Life 2xxx*, and *Shape Shiftr 1*. This appears to be a posthumous/tribute inclusion on Midwife's show rather than a standalone Killd By broadcast. Midwife (Madeline Johnston) is already documented in the vault as a friend and collaborator.

**Action item (next active pass):** Enumerate every show/mix on the NTS Killd By page fully. Determine whether there are additional show appearances beyond the Midwife broadcast. Capture each show URL via SPN.
